title: 最高のイケイケスポット

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky has made her mark in the Twinkle
Series with numerous spectacular results.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been the center of attention since before
her debut, but now she's even more renowned.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she's achieved more than just running some
amazing races...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOOM! Screeeech!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Thanks for waiting!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Thanks for waiting!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm going to take you to a fly spot that
only the hippest homeslices know about!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh my, aren't we suspicious! You know I'm always on the lookout for the latest trends! If I say it's fly, then you can be sure it's legit!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So hurry up and get in! We're going to have a
bangin' time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We're here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Are you surprised?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You can always enjoy out-of-sight races here,
whether you're cheering in the crowd or running
on the track!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
It really is! I'm always rooting for you,
Maruzensky! Good luck in the next race!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh! Teehee, thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You can even meet famous Umamusume... like
me! Heehee, kidding! ♪
choice_data_list: It really is a fly spot!
It really is a fly spot!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? Everyone here looks like they're
having a great time!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Now let's go watch some exciting races!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
200 meters to go! She's taking the inside... She's
broken into the lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The favorite is out ahead! She's in first place!
Aaaand, SHE WINS!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: Congrats on getting first place!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much! Thanks, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text: You're my forever favorite! Give it your all!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: Thanks! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That was all that! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: Oh! Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: I'll be able to race against you soon, so get ready!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll be waiting for you! See you on the
track!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, there really is so much fun to be had at
the racecourse!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
At first, I wasn't sure about running just for the
fun of it...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I was reluctant to make my debut. I
even thought it might be better not to run at all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But now, I'm really glad I kept going!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Surrounded by these adorable students, and even
rivals, I'm having the time of my life!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to your support, Trainer!
choice_data_list: I'm just having fun watching you run!
I'm just having fun watching you run!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It's all thanks to your support, Trainer!
choice_data_list: I'm just having fun watching you run!
I'm just having fun watching you run!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! Your compliments are what make me the
happiest!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to live up to your expectations and give
you some fantastic races!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You'll be watching me, right? From your special
place in my passenger seat!
choice_data_list: Yeah, keep up the good work!
Yeah, keep up the good work!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I will! And I'll keep it going at full throttle!
